title: Last and First Men
description: Last and First Men — knowledge fragments for AI agents

memes.label: About This Wiki
memes.description: A knowledge wiki for "Last and First Men" — this page is auto-generated from book metadata

memes.label: "Colophon"
memes.description: "![The Standard Ebooks"

memes.label: "Introduction"
memes.description: "This book has two authors, one contemporary with its readers, the other an inhabitant of an age which they would call the distant future. The brain that…"

memes.label: "Preface"
memes.description: "This is a work of fiction. I have tried to invent a story which may seem a possible, or at least not wholly impossible, account of the future of man; and I…"

memes.label: 'Table of Contents'
memes.description: 'Table of Contents for Last and First Men'

memes.label: "Uncopyright"
memes.description: "Copyright pages exist to tell you that you *can’t* do something. Unlike them, this Uncopyright page exists to tell you that the writing and artwork in this…"

memes.label: Aeroplane
memes.description: The mechanically powered fixed-wing aircraft that dominated human flight technology from the First Men through the Fifth Men era, before being superseded by biological and personal flight technologies.

memes.label: Africa
memes.description: A continent on Earth that partnered with Asia as a geopolitical bloc opposing the American Continental Federation during the First Men era.

memes.label: "Age of the Fifth Men"
memes.description: "The golden age of telepathic culture and artistic achievement under the Fifth Men on Earth."

memes.label: "Age of the First Men"
memes.description: "The dawn era of Homo sapiens, from prehistory through global unification to catastrophic collapse."

relations.label: Chapter V: The Fall of the First Men

memes.label: "Age of the Great Brains"
memes.description: "The era dominated by the Great Brains (Fourth Men), characterized by radical bioengineering and the creation of the Fifth Men."

memes.label: Agriculture
memes.description: The cultivation of food that sustained civilizations across human history — from the First World State's industrial-agricultural integration to post-collapse subsistence farming.

memes.label: "America"
memes.description: "The North American continent that rose to global superpower status in the twilight of First Men civilization, shaping the world's economic and cultural destiny before the First Dark Age."

memes.label: American Madness
memes.description: A devastating plague of pulmonary and nervous diseases that destroyed American civilization and spread globally during the fall of the First World State.

memes.label: Americas
memes.description: The combined North and South American continents, which became the economic and political centre of the American Continental Federation during the First Men era.

memes.label: Andes
memes.description: The great mountain range running along the western coast of South America, home to shepherd communities and the birthplace of a notable Patagonian religious leader.

memes.label: "Anglo-French War"
memes.description: "A devastating war between England and France, triggered by a false scandal and a stray-aircraft accident, that sealed the fate of the First Men."

memes.label: Antarctic Coal
memes.description: The vast coal deposits of Antarctica that powered the First World State and whose exhaustion triggered the collapse of the first global civilization.

memes.label: Antarctica
memes.description: Earth's southernmost continent, a crucial source of fuel and mineral wealth during the First Men era, later inhabited by a Nordic culture and invaded by Martians.

memes.label: Arctic
memes.description: Earth's northern polar region, whose Canadian islands were ingeniously warmed and inhabited during the World State era, and which later became nearly deserted.

memes.label: Asia
memes.description: Earth's largest continent, which formed a geopolitical bloc with North Africa during the era of American-Chinese global rivalry.

memes.label: Astronomy
memes.description: The science of the stars that revealed humanity's cosmic insignificance — from American observatories mapping galaxies to the Last Men's ultimate astronomical vision of the stellar explosion.

memes.label: Australia
memes.description: A continent in the Southern Hemisphere that was colonized by Patagonian sailing ships and later merged with the East Indies into a continuous continent.

memes.label: Bacteria
memes.description: Microscopic organisms whose roles span from disease and biological warfare among the First Men, to the subvital units that constituted the alien biology of the Martians, to the conceptual foundation for understanding life at its most fundamental level.

memes.label: Bahía Blanca
memes.description: An ancient settlement on the coast of South America east of which the Patagonian civilization originated.

memes.label: Biology
memes.description: The biological sciences as understood and advanced across successive human species, from the First Men's mechanistic biology to the engineered biology of later species that enabled the deliberate remaking of human nature.

memes.label: Bolshevik Revolution
memes.description: "The revolutionary overthrow that established a radical new order in Russia, triggering an original cultural renaissance and a new mode of disciplined political organization — the party-state — whose influence spread across Eurasia and reshaped global civilization."

memes.label: Brain
memes.description: The biological organ of intelligence whose limitations, enhancements, and radical transformations across eighteen human species define the evolutionary trajectory in Stapledon's future history — from the First Men's crippling neural constraints to the Great Brains' pure cognition.

memes.label: Brazil
memes.description: A region of South America whose highlands were settled by the expanding Patagonian civilization and which later formed a land bridge with West Africa after geological catastrophe.

memes.label: "I: Balkan Europe"
memes.description: "Observe now your own epoch of history as it appears to the Last"

memes.label: "II: Europe’s Downfall"
memes.description: "Over the heads of the European tribes two mightier peoples regarded each other with increasing dislike. Well might they; for the one cherished the most ancient…"

memes.label: "III: America and China"
memes.description: "After the eclipse of Europe, the allegiance of men gradually crystallized into two great national or racial sentiments, the American and the Chinese. Little by…"

memes.label: "IV: An Americanized Planet"
memes.description: "We have now reached that point in the history of the First Men when, some three hundred and eighty terrestrial years after the European War, the goal of world…"

memes.label: "V: The Fall of the First Men"
memes.description: "We have reached a period in man’s history rather less than five thousand years after the life of Newton. In this chapter we must cover about one hundred and…"

memes.label: "VI: Transition"
memes.description: "By one of those rare tricks of fortune, which are as often favourable as hostile to humanity, an Arctic exploration ship had recently been embedded in the…"

memes.label: "VII: The Rise of the Second Men"
memes.description: "It was some ten million years after the Patagonian disaster that the first elements of a new human species appeared, in an epidemic of biological variations,…"

memes.label: "VIII: The Martians"
memes.description: "Upon the foothills of the new and titanic mountains that were once the Hindu Kush, were many holiday centres, whence the young men and women of Asia were wont…"

memes.label: "IX: Earth and Mars"
memes.description: "Such were the beings that invaded the earth when the Second Men were gathering their strength for a great venture in artificial evolution. The motives of the…"

memes.label: "X: The Third Men in the Wilderness"
memes.description: "We have now followed man’s career during some forty million years. The whole period to be covered by this chronicle is about two thousand million. In this…"

memes.label: "XI: Man Remakes Himself"
memes.description: "Those who sought to produce a super-brain embarked upon a great enterprise of research and experiment in a remote corner of the planet. It is unnecessary to…"

memes.label: "XII: The Last Terrestrials"
memes.description: "The Fifth Men had not been endowed with that potential immortality which their makers themselves possessed. And from the fact that they were mortal and yet…"

memes.label: "XIII: Humanity on Venus"
memes.description: "Man’s sojourn on Venus lasted somewhat longer than his whole career on the Earth. From the days of Pithecanthropus to the final evacuation of his native planet…"

memes.label: "XIV: Neptune"
memes.description: "I have told man’s story up to a point about halfway from his origin to his annihilation. Behind lies the vast span which includes the whole Terrestrial and…"

memes.label: "XV: The Last Men"
memes.description: "If one of the First Men could enter the world of the Last Men, he would find many things familiar and much that would seem strangely distorted and perverse.…"

memes.label: "XVI: The Last of Man"
memes.description: "Ours has been essentially a philosophical age, in fact the supreme age of philosophy. But a great practical problem has also concerned us. We have had to…"

memes.label: Chemistry
memes.description: The chemical sciences across the eighteen human species, from the First Men's industrial chemistry to the revolutionary chemistry of the later species that transformed energy production and planetary engineering.

memes.label: China
memes.description: A major nation-state on Earth during the First Men era, viewed as the "natural enemy" of America and a dominant force in global politics after Europe's eclipse.

memes.label: Christianity
memes.description: "The religion centered on Jesus of Nazareth, whose ideal of selfless love persisted across human species and evolutionary epochs."

memes.label: "Index of Civilizations"
memes.description: "A comprehensive index of the major human civilizations that rose and fell across Earth, Venus, Neptune, and beyond."

memes.label: "Collapse and Renewal"
memes.description: "The recurring pattern of civilizational collapse followed by eventual renewal that defines human evolutionary history across all eighteen species and two billion years."

memes.label: "Index of Concepts"
memes.description: "An index of philosophical, scientific, and cultural concepts that emerge across the two-billion-year chronicle of humanity."

memes.label: Conscience
memes.description: The moral conscience as it appears across human history in "Last and First Men," from the nationalistic guilt of the First Men to the cosmic ethical awareness of the Last Men.

memes.label: Daughter of Man
memes.description: "A symbolic figure in First Men global politics — a woman of mixed race whose spiritual and physical union with the World President became a cult-like legitimizing force for the nascent world government, demonstrating how the First Men fused sexuality, media, and political authority."

memes.label: Disease
memes.description: The biological affliction that plagued humanity across multiple species and eras, from the microbial epidemics of the First Men through the species-specific vulnerabilities of later human forms.

relations.label: scientific knowledge that conquered microbial disease

memes.label: Earth
memes.description: The original homeworld of humanity and the setting for the earliest phases of human evolution, from the First Men through the Fifth Men.

memes.label: Earth
memes.description: The original home of humanity — the planet where the First Men arose, where eighteen human species began their evolution, and the stage for the earliest chapters of human history.

memes.label: "Eighteenth Men"
memes.description: "The eighteenth and final human species, identical to the Last Men — beings of perfect telepathy, biological flight, and cosmic consciousness on Neptune who faced extinction with serene aesthetic completion."

memes.label: Eighth Men
memes.description: A giant, long-headed human species on Venus who made the discovery that the solar system was doomed — and designed the Ninth Men to carry human intelligence to the outer planets.

memes.label: "Albert Einstein"
memes.description: "Albert Einstein, referenced as a historical time-marker for the era of the book's narrator and as a baseline for human longevity comparisons."

memes.label: Electricity
memes.description: The role of electrical power generation and distribution across human civilizations, from the First Men's coal-to-electricity conversion to the advanced energy systems of later species.

memes.label: "England"
memes.description: "A major European island nation-state of the First Men era, historic rival of France, co-founder of Western physical science, and exemplar of the volatile psychology that both elevated and undermined the First Men's civilization."

memes.label: "Index of Historical Eras"
memes.description: "A chronological index of the major historical eras spanning two billion years of human history, from the First Men to the Eighteenth Men."

memes.label: Europe
memes.description: The continent that was the primary theatre of the First Men's earliest catastrophic wars and the original source of Western intellectual culture before its eclipse by America and China.

memes.label: European Confederacy
memes.description: A political union of European nations formed under Chinese leadership during the pre-World State era, representing a transitional phase between nationalism and global governance.

memes.label: "European War"
memes.description: "The first and least destructive of the world conflicts that display the First Men's tragic incompetence in controlling their own nature."

memes.label: "Index of Events"
memes.description: "An index of major historical events — wars, catastrophes, discoveries, and transitions — that shaped the destiny of humanity across two billion years."

memes.label: Evolution
memes.description: The central biological process of the book — both natural evolution across two billion years and the deliberate artificial evolution by which later human species designed their successors.

memes.label: Falkland Islands
memes.description: A former island group in the South Atlantic that became part of a vast new land bridge connecting South America to Antarctica through geological transformation.

memes.label: Fall of the First World State
memes.description: The catastrophic collapse of the first global human civilization, brought about by energy depletion, religious fanaticism, and biological warfare.
aliases: collapse of the First World State

memes.label: "Featured Pages"
memes.description: "A curated showcase of the highest-quality pages in the wiki — featured and premium entries ranked by citation count, representing the best of the chronicle's coverage."

memes.label: "Fifth Men"
memes.description: "The most artistically and intellectually advanced of all human species on Earth, combining telepathy with extreme longevity."

memes.label: "Fifth Men World Community"
memes.description: "The global civilization of the Fifth Men, organized around artistic and philosophical excellence."

memes.label: Finance
memes.description: The economic force that shaped civilizations across human history, from American financial imperialism over Russia to the cosmopolitan control of planetary resources.

memes.label: "First Dark Age"
memes.description: "The catastrophic collapse of First Men civilization following the European War and subsequent global conflicts, lasting tens of thousands of years."

memes.label: "First Men"
memes.description: "The brilliant but self-destructive original species that seeded all eighteen forms of humanity."

memes.label: "First World State"
memes.description: "First global human government, four millennia of material triumph ending in catastrophic collapse."

relations.label: Chapter V: The Fall of the First Men

memes.label: "Flying"
memes.description: "The pursuit of aerial locomotion across human evolution — mechanical, biological, and personal."

memes.label: "Fourth Men"
memes.description: "An artificially created species of immense disembodied brains that pursued pure intellect for three thousand years before succumbing to existential despair and engineering their own successors."

memes.label: France
memes.description: A major European nation-state during the First Men era that achieved continental mastery of Europe before being challenged by England and eventually eclipsed by America and China.

memes.label: Germany
memes.description: "A major European power known for its scientific brilliance, philosophical systematization, and eventual role in leading a unified Europe after the era of nation-state conflicts."

memes.label: Gordelpus
memes.description: The central deity-figure of the First World State's scientific religion — the "Prime Mover" whose worship united science and faith in a global state cult.

memes.label: "Great Brains"
memes.description: "The Fourth Men — immense disembodied brains that achieved supreme intellectual mastery but lacked emotional depth."

memes.label: "Great Brains Civilization"
memes.description: "The civilization of the Great Brains (Fourth Men), enormous disembodied brain-beings who engineered successor species but failed to understand them."

memes.label: "Group Mind"
memes.description: "A collective consciousness formed by merging individual minds, developed by Martians and contrasted with human telepathy."

memes.label: "Immortality"
memes.description: "The evolving concept of personal and racial immortality across human species, from religious belief to biological reality."

memes.label: India
memes.description: "The South Asian civilization whose spiritual tradition of world-renunciation was one of humanity's earliest intimations of cosmic destiny."

memes.label: Individuality
memes.description: The concept of individual identity and its varying manifestations across the eighteen human species, from the fiercely proud First Men to the communal super-individuality of the Last Men.

memes.label: "Interglacial Period"
memes.description: "The geologically brief interglacial period between the First and Second Dark Ages, when the Patagonian Civilization briefly flourished."

memes.label: International College of Science
memes.description: The global corporation of scientific workers in the First World State era, controlling access to scientific research through examination and membership fees.

relations.label: Fall of the First World State

memes.label: Italy
memes.description: A major European nation-state of the First Men era, whose conflict with France over African territory triggered the opening phase of the European War.

memes.label: "Jesus"
memes.description: "First-century religious leader of the First Men era, exemplar of integrity of will and unselfish love, identified by the Last Men as a singular mind of possible cosmic origin."

memes.label: Jews
memes.description: The unique people who preserved intelligence as a value through the First Men's dark ages and became indispensable to the financial and intellectual organization of the First World State.

memes.label: Labrador
memes.description: The failed human settlement in Labrador during the Second Dark Age, which devolved into animality and ultimately peopled the western hemisphere.

memes.label: "Last Men"
memes.description: "The eighteenth and final human species on Neptune, achieving spiritual transcendence before the end of humanity."

memes.label: "Last Men Commonwealth"
memes.description: "The final human civilization on Neptune — a telepathically unified, astronomically-minded society."

memes.label: "Last Men Era"
memes.description: "The final epoch of humanity on Neptune, two billion years in the future, ending with cosmic extinction."

memes.label: "League of Nations"
memes.description: "International organization of national governments that served as humanity's first experiment in global governance, ultimately superseded by the First World State."

memes.label: Life
memes.description: The nature and meaning of life as explored across two billion years of human evolution in Stapledon's future history — from biological existence to cosmic purpose.

memes.label: London
memes.description: "The capital of England, destroyed during the Anglo-French War in the era of the First Men."

memes.label: "Longevity"
memes.description: "The greatly extended natural lifespan of the Fifth Men and later species, a key biological advancement."

memes.label: Love
memes.description: The varied forms and roles of love across human species in Stapledon's future history — from the First Men's romantic and erotic passions to the spiritualized communal love of later human species.

memes.label: Mars
memes.description: The fourth planet of the Solar System, home to a unique form of collective sentient life — the Martians — who invaded Earth in the era of the First Men.

memes.label: Mars
memes.description: The fourth planet — home to the indigenous cloud-jelly Martians, target of human exploration after the Martian invasion, and the site of one of humanity's most tragic encounters with alien intelligence.

memes.label: Martian Civilization
memes.description: The native civilization of Mars — a cloud-jelly species whose unified global society achieved vast scientific knowledge before launching an invasion of Earth.

memes.label: "Martian Era"
memes.description: "First contact and interplanetary war between the Martian cloud-beings and the Second Men of Earth."

memes.label: Martian Invasions
memes.description: A series of invasions from Mars during the era of the Second Men, in which Martian cloud-jellies sought to extract Earth's water and destroy human civilization.

memes.label: "Martians"
memes.description: "Electromagnetic cloud-beings from Mars — first alien intelligence encountered by humanity."

memes.label: Medicine
memes.description: "The biological and medical sciences that enabled the First Men to eliminate most diseases, though fundamental biological theory eventually stagnated."

memes.label: Migration to Venus
memes.description: The mass relocation of humanity from Earth to Venus, forced by the impending collision of the Moon with Earth, during the era of the Fifth Men.

memes.label: "Moonfall Era"
memes.description: "The catastrophic era when Earth's moon spiraled inward and disintegrated, triggering planetary devastation, a ten-million-year human exile in Siberia, and the birth of the Second Men."

memes.label: "Most Cited Pages"
memes.description: "A statistical ranking of the most frequently cited pages across the entire wiki — a map of the knowledge graph's central nodes, showing which topics are most interconnected."

memes.label: Music
memes.description: The central art form of multiple human species — from the Third Men's musical theocracy to the cosmic "music of the spheres" perceived by the Last Men.

memes.label: Nationalist Party of China
memes.description: The ruling party of China during the pre-World State era, a half civil service, half religious order that approached the Platonic ideal of philosopher-kings.

memes.label: Neptune
memes.description: The outermost planet of the Solar System and the final home of humanity, where the Eighteenth Men (the Last Men) lived out the closing chapters of human history.

memes.label: Neptune
memes.description: The outermost home of humanity — the cold, distant world where the last human species achieved their final, most transcendent form of consciousness.

memes.label: "Neptunian Civilization"
memes.description: "The final and most brilliant human civilization, established on Neptune under the Last Men, spanning an epoch as long as all prior human history."

memes.label: "Neptunian Era"
memes.description: "The final and most brilliant epoch of humanity on Neptune, spanning an age as long as all prior human history and ending with human extinction."

memes.label: "Isaac Newton"
memes.description: "Isaac Newton, referenced as a historical scientific benchmark against which later human scientific achievements are measured."

memes.label: Ninth Men
memes.description: A delicately organized human species purpose-designed for life in the outer solar system — the first of humanity's deliberately engineered spacefaring forms.

memes.label: "Olaf Stapledon"
memes.description: "Olaf Stapledon (1886–1950), British philosopher and author of Last and First Men (1930), referenced within the narrative framework of the book."

memes.label: "Index of Organizations"
memes.description: "An index of political, scientific, and religious organizations — the institutions that governed, guided, and sometimes fractured human civilization across two billion years."

memes.label: "Patagonia"
memes.description: "The fertile southern region of South America where the last great First Men civilization arose after the First Dark Age, centered on vast new plains raised by geological upheaval."

memes.label: "Patagonian Civilization"
memes.description: "First Men civilization of post-Dark Age Patagonia: sober intellectualism and youth worship."

memes.label: Patagonian Rebellion
memes.description: An internal conflict within the Patagonian civilization between traditionalists who rejected new scientific knowledge and progressives who sought to embrace it.

memes.label: "Index of Persons"
memes.description: "An index of notable individuals, philosophers, scientists, and leaders who shaped human history across two billion years."

memes.label: Peru
memes.description: A region of western South America whose ancient indigenous stock re-emerged after the decline of European influence and contributed to the racial makeup of the Patagonian civilization.

memes.label: Philosophy
memes.description: The pursuit of wisdom and understanding that evolved across eighteen human species, from the First Men's tentative inquiries to the Last Men's cosmic philosophical insight.

memes.label: Photosynthesis
memes.description: The biological process of converting sunlight into energy, used by Martian cloudlets, Venusian aerial organisms, and later artificially by the Last Men on Neptune.

memes.label: Physics
memes.description: The scientific discipline that unlocked subatomic energy and whose fragmentation and politicization shaped the fate of the First Men's civilization.

memes.label: "Index of Places"
memes.description: "A complete index of geographical locations — planets, continents, regions, and cities — that appear across the two-billion-year chronicle of humanity."

memes.label: "Planetary Migration"
memes.description: "The multi-stage migration of humanity across the solar system — from Earth to Venus to Neptune — driven by environmental catastrophe and species adaptation."

memes.label: "Plato"
memes.description: "Classical Greek philosopher of the First Men era whose ideal of philosopher-kings influenced governance models across human evolutionary history."

memes.label: Plymouth Conference
memes.description: An international gathering of scientists at Plymouth, England, where a young Chinese physicist's report to a select committee exemplified the transnational character of science during the First Men era.

memes.label: "President of the World"
memes.description: "The executive leader of the First World State, who unified science and religion and established the Sacred Order of Scientists."

memes.label: Psychology
memes.description: The study of mind and mentality that evolved across human species — from the First Men's declining mental powers to the Last Men's transcendent group consciousness.

memes.label: Radiation
memes.description: A fundamental force in the Stapledonian cosmos — from subatomic energy that transformed human power to the radiant communication that unified Martian consciousness.

memes.label: Regenerate Christian Brotherhood
memes.description: The most powerful Western Christian church of the First World State era, which regarded the Discoverer of Gordelpus as the Second Coming of Christ.

relations.label: Fall of the First World State

memes.label: Religion
memes.description: The evolving institution of religious belief and practice across human history, from primitive tribal worship through the scientific religion of the First World State to the religion of love among the Last Men.

memes.label: Religion
memes.description: The evolving forms of religious belief across human history — from the First Men's primitive faiths through the scientific religion of the World State to the Last Men's cosmic worship.

memes.label: Reproduction
memes.description: The diverse modes of reproduction across the eighteen human species and Martian life, from conventional human sexuality to the radical subvital reproduction of Martian cloudlets and the engineered breeding of later eras.

memes.label: Russia
memes.description: "The vast Eurasian nation that underwent the Bolshevik Revolution and became a center of cultural and intellectual renaissance among the First Men."

memes.label: Russo-German War
memes.description: A pivotal early conflict in First Men history — the Russo-German War reshaped the European balance of power and set the stage for the eventual unification of the world under a single state.

memes.label: Sacred Order of Scientists
memes.description: The elite religious-scientific organization of the First World State, entrusted as custodians of the alleged supreme secret of Gordelpus and responsible for scientific research and worship.

relations.label: fall of the First World State

memes.label: Sahara
memes.description: A former desert region of Africa that was transformed by climate change into a lake district crowded with holiday resorts during the First Men's World State era.

memes.label: Science
memes.description: The systematic pursuit of knowledge across human history — from the First Men's industrial science to the Last Men's cosmic understanding of universal process.

memes.label: Second Dark Age
memes.description: A ten-million-year period of collapse and barbarism following the fall of the First World State — the longest dark age in human history, during which civilization was reduced to scattered tribal existence.

memes.label: "Second Men"
memes.description: "The successor species that emerged after the collapse of the First Men, larger and more robust."

memes.label: "Second Men Civilization"
memes.description: "The patchwork civilization of the Second Men, built after the collapse of the first World State, characterized by innate cosmopolitanism and natural altruism."

memes.label: "Seventeenth Men"
memes.description: "A glorious but subtly imperfect human species on Neptune, created by the Sixteenth Men — they lived a brief career of a few hundred thousand years crowded with splendour and agony."

memes.label: Seventh Men
memes.description: A pygmy, bat-like human species capable of powered flight — the most carefree of all human species, whose aerial culture endured for millions of years on Venus.

memes.label: Sexuality
memes.description: The role of sexual drives, symbols, and regulations in First Men civilization — as a tool of mass manipulation, a target of religious reform, and a fundamental human energy that successive species channeled differently.

memes.label: Siberia
memes.description: A region of Earth's northern coast that served as the last refuge of the First Men during the moonfall catastrophe and the birthplace of the Second Men.

memes.label: Sixteenth Men
memes.description: A late human species on Neptune that endured for nearly fifty million years, cycling through culture after culture before making the perilous decision to engineer their own successors.

memes.label: Sixth Men
memes.description: A human species on Venus distinguished by their profound empathy with animals — a trait that enriched their culture but ultimately constrained their development.

memes.label: "Socrates"
memes.description: "Athenian philosopher of the First Men era, exemplar of intellectual integrity and dispassionate intelligence, identified by the Last Men as a singular mind of possible cosmic origin."

memes.label: "Solar Catastrophe"
memes.description: "The astronomical event when the sun entered a volatile phase transition, compelling humanity's emergency migration from Venus to Neptune — the most ambitious interplanetary evacuation in human history."

memes.label: Solar System
memes.description: The planetary system around the Sun that serves as the cosmic stage for the two-billion-year history of human evolution across 18 distinct species.

memes.label: South America
memes.description: A continent that served as a key nursery for post-apocalyptic civilization, particularly in Patagonia, during the First Men era.

memes.label: "Index of Human Species"
memes.description: "A complete index of all eighteen human species, from the First Men to the Eighteenth Men, spanning two billion years of evolution."

memes.label: Telepathy
memes.description: "Direct mental communication between individuals, developed to varying degrees across multiple human species over two billion years."

memes.label: "Telepathy"
memes.description: "The evolution of telepathic ability across human species — from primitive empathy among the First Men to the cosmic group-mind of the Last Men."

memes.label: Telescope
memes.description: The astronomical instruments through which successive human species observed the cosmos, from the First Men's ground-based telescopes to the instruments that revealed the moon's mysterious acceleration and the solar catastrophe.

memes.label: "Tenth Men"
memes.description: "A primitive rabbit-evolved human species on Neptune that developed basic tool use, wicker villages, and rudimentary culture across the northern continents."

memes.label: Third Men
memes.description: The third human species, characterized by six-fingered hands, short lifespans, emotional intensity, and a deep preoccupation with music and religion — eventually supplanted by the Great Brains.

memes.label: "Third Men Civilization"
memes.description: "The scattered pastoral civilization of the Third Men, characterized by deep empathy with animals, manipulative skill, and religious worship of life."

memes.label: "Age of the Third Men"
memes.description: "The era of the Third Men, a pastoral and biocentric species that arose after a thirty-million-year racial trance of the Second Men."

memes.label: "Venerian Civilization"
memes.description: "The long and culturally diverse civilization established by humanity on Venus, lasting longer than the entire Terrestrial career of the human race."

memes.label: Venerians
memes.description: The indigenous intelligent species of Venus — a marine civilization inhabiting the Venerian ocean floor, ultimately exterminated by human colonization.

memes.label: Venus
memes.description: The second planet from the Sun and humanity's second homeworld, colonized by the Fifth Men after Earth became uninhabitable, serving as the stage for multiple human species.

memes.label: Venus
memes.description: The second planet — home to the aquatic Venerians, later colonized by terrestrial humanity, and the cradle of the Fifth through Eighth human species.

memes.label: "Venusian Era"
memes.description: "The vast epoch of human civilization on Venus, lasting longer than the entire prior history of humanity on Earth."

memes.label: "War"
memes.description: "Organized conflict from tribal warfare to interplanetary invasion across two billion years."

memes.label: Water
memes.description: The essential planetary resource — from Earth's waterpower sustaining civilization to Mars's water scarcity driving Martian evolution and their eventual invasion of Earth.

memes.label: "World Financial Directorate"
memes.description: "The true governing body of the First World State, a council of roughly a dozen millionaires who held effective power behind the facade of guild-socialist democracy."

memes.label: World Industrial Council
memes.description: The governing body of global industry in the First World State, where leaders of each industry discussed and coordinated economic policy under government supervision.

relations.label: Fall of the First World State

memes.label: World State
memes.description: The concept and various implementations of a unified world government across human history, from the First World State to the planetary administrations of later species.

memes.label: World State Government
memes.description: The governing apparatus of the First World State — the political institution that unified humanity under a single administration for the first time in history.
